name: hud_ui_background_confirm_quit_lifecycle
description: HudUiBackgroundConfirmQuit constructs the confirm-quit HUD background, installs OK and cancel button vtables, loads and binds the dialog widgets, frees loaded roots, and tears down the two buttons before the background base.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison still fails for HudUiBackgroundConfirmQuit::Constructor at 0x415680: 125 unmasked mismatches, 56 relocation bytes masked, 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 182 bytes, VC object symbol size 128 bytes.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison still fails for HudUiBackgroundConfirmQuit::Destructor at 0x4157b0: 81 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 95 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
The remaining binary drift is dominated by retail MSVC constructor/destructor EH registration and cleanup scaffolding not emitted by the current functional source shape.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415680 validates HudUiBackground construction, OK and cancel HudUiZrdWidget construction at offsets 0xa94c and 0xaa98, ftable installs, dialog.zrd CONFIRM_QUIT load, OK_TO_QUIT and CANCEL_QUIT binding, loaded-root cleanup, and returning self.

Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4157b0 validates cancel-button destructor-core, OK-button destructor-core, then HudUiBackground::Destructor; 0x415790 validates the scalar deleting destructor wrapper.

The native smoke patches HudUiBackground::LoadFromZrd, BindWidgetByName, and FreeLoadedTreeRoots to verify the requested ZRD path/section, binding names and member widget pointers, cleanup argument, returned this pointer, initialized button ftables, destructor execution, and scalar-deleting destructor return.
